name: psp-detector
description: Chrome extension to detect Payment Service Providers on web pages

scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run lint:scripts && npm run lint:web && npm run lint:deps && npm run typecheck && npm run deadcode && npm run test
scripts.lint:html: node tools/lint-web.mjs html public/popup.html public/options.html docs/privacy-policy.html
scripts.lint:web: npm run lint:html && npm run lint:manifest
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && npx playwright install chromium && playwright test --config=playwright.e2e.config.ts
scripts.test:integration: npm run build && npx playwright install chromium && playwright test --config=playwright.config.ts
scripts.validate: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run lint:scripts && npm run typecheck && npm run knip && npm run deadcode && npm run lint:deps && npm run build && npm run test && npm run lint:web
